✦︎Hello! Mabuhay!

My name is Shen Alaissa Mangubat. As always, I prefer to be called by my first name-Shen. I am a 17-year-old Grade 11 Allied Health student at Fidelis Senior High School. I am often described as well-behaved, demure, and composed. As a student, I strive to approach my academic responsibilities with discipline, passion and dedication. At present, I take my studies seriously and aim to continuously improve not only my academic performance but also my personal and moral development. I certainly believe that growth comes from consistent effort and reflection, and that learning is a lifelong and continuous process. Therefore, this mindset motivates me to work hard and remain committed to my goals.

MY GOALS

My Main Goal

My goal is to become a registered nurse here in the country. As my parents always remind me, “Mag-aral ka ng mabuti para kapag nakapagtapos ka, mabibigyan mo na ng ginhawa ang buhay mo.” Because of this, I live by the principle: “Hanggang may nagpapaaral, patuloy akong lalaban.” For myself, there are two things I aspire to achieve: simply a stable life with my own house and a car. But these are not just for me—they are also for my parents. My parents have always dreamed of a peaceful and stable life in the countryside. They hope to run a rice field and have a piggery, and I want to help them turn that dream into reality.
